atoms.source_hunk_hint: feature-preservation-map.md section 2: Async Precompile Detection And Validation
atoms.source_snippet: Feature-preservation claims: Preserve timing semantics: scheduled async simulation block is `startBlock + frequency * index - 1` (`#78`, `#150`), Phase 2 offset must be `> ttl` and `<= MAX_PHASE2_DEADLINE_OFFSET` (`#232`), shared TTL source is `max_ttl_blocks()` / `ASYNC_MAX_TTL_BLOCKS` (`#242`), default TTL is `500` (`#265`)
atoms.semantic_claim: Preserve timing semantics: scheduled async simulation block is `startBlock + frequency * index - 1` (`#78`, `#150`), Phase 2 offset must be `> ttl` and `<= MAX_PHASE2_DEADLINE_OFFSET` (`#232`), shared TTL source is `max_ttl_blocks()` / `ASYNC_MAX_TTL_BLOCKS` (`#242`), default TTL is `500` (`#265`).
